That aside, it would give coverage to you (obviously), St Neots, Huntingdon, over Cambridge way, bits of Bedford. It would fill in quite a few gaps. Wherever you put one, are you going for an off the shelf solution, or do you want to build your own? (edited)

messages.author: Shaitan
messages.text: Personally I set a static lat/lon and fudge it a bit so it’s in a rough location. I don’t want it pinpointed since it would dox me (as it’s QTHR) or if it was a remote node I wouldn’t want it found easily.
messages.content_html: Personally I set a static lat/lon and fudge it a bit so it’s in a rough location. I don’t want it pinpointed since it would dox me (as it’s QTHR) or if it was a remote node I wouldn’t want it found easily.
